scenario: Duplicate charging notifications when placing one earbud in unplugged open charging case while wearing the other earbud
description_clean: Repeat charging notifications appear when one earbud is placed in the unplugged, open charging case while wearing the other earbud. Expected: only one charging notification, since only one earbud is charging.
steps: 1. Open the charging case (unplugged, no cable connected).
2. Remove one earbud from the charging case and wear it.
3. Place the other earbud back into the charging case (case remains open).
4. Observe the notifications on the Poly Studio Mobile app or phone notification shade.
expected: Only one charging notification appears, since only one earbud is placed in the case and charging.
actual: Repeat charging notifications appear continuously or multiple times while only one earbud is in the case.
